title: Scroll Area Component
content:
## Scroll Area Component The `ScrollArea` component provides a customizable and accessible scrollable container, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`. It allows you to create elegant scrolling experiences within your application. ### Key Exports * **`ScrollArea`**: The main component for creating a scrollable area. * **`ScrollBar`**: A component to define the appearance and behavior of the scrollbar within the `ScrollArea`. ### `ScrollArea` Component Props The `ScrollArea` component accepts all props supported by `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`'s `Root` component, including standard HTML attributes and the `className` prop for styling. ### `ScrollBar` Component Props * **`className`**: Optional string for applying custom styles to the scrollbar. * **`orientation`**: Defines the orientation of the scrollbar. Accepts either `'vertical'` (default) or `'horizontal'`. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { ScrollArea, ScrollBar } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area"; function MyComponent() { return (

{i + 1}. Item
))}
); } export default MyComponent; ``` This example demonstrates how to use the `ScrollArea` component to create a vertically scrollable container with a fixed height and width. The `ScrollBar` is implicitly included and styled by default. You can customize its appearance and orientation as needed.
